name: 双雄风流传（Romantic Emperor）
short_description: In 双雄风流传（Romantic Emperor）, you will embark on an unprecedented gaming journey. This is a unique game that combines both visual fiction and business construction.
detailed_description:
Romantic Emperor - power and tenderness, interwoven through the ages!

Steam platform shock launch!

Welcome to join the exchange group:

Players who cannot join QQ groups can join steam discussion groups through the Game Store page - Community Center

The beginning of the story:

In the grand picture of ancient China, power and desire intertwine, intrigue and love coexist. Do you choose to become the supreme emperor, protecting the country, or become an ambitious vassal, topple the dynasty and rewrite history? Every choice you make will write a unique legend!

King's Road: (Choose Emperor Line)

As the king of a kingdom, you will be in the midst of a splendid palace, facing the infighting of the court.

Solve puzzles and unravel conspiracies: Through the form of a visual novel, you will step by step uncover the secrets hidden in the depths of the court. Assassinations, betrayals, conspiracy... You need to strategize, see through the enemy's tricks, and protect your imperial power!

Emotional interweaving, confidant: In the vortex of power, you will meet with a number of different characters of the heroine. They may be gentle and virtuous, or wise and courageous, or mysterious. There may be crucial links in their speeches, and grasp the clues in them to overthrow the power of treacherous ministers at one stroke.

(Currently only the first two chapters of the King's Road are available, we will continue to update them in the future)

Emperor Line characters:

Harem words matter person - Princess

  • The man behind it -- X

  • Emperor's attendants - palace like jade

Protagonist Path: (Select Protagonist line)

As a vassal, you will be far away from the prosperity of the imperial city and immersed in the fireworks of the city.

Build, develop power: Through city management and construction, you will manage people, plant labor, develop technology, and gradually grow your power. From desolation to prosperity, your every step is crucial!

Build an army and conquer the imperial city: Eventually, you will lead a large army to conquer the imperial city and overthrow the dynasty. In the process, you will fight against different organizations and cultivate the best until you become the master of the entire kingdom!

Increased Favorability with Red Building NPCS will trigger two beautiful CG images after reaching completion

Protagonist line part of the character display:

Woman -- Jin Yue

  • Flower leader -- Haiqiong

Vision and Experience:

Hand-painted style: The game uses a beautiful hand-painted style, with a pseudo-3D perspective, to show you a lifelike ancient world. Whether it is the grandeur of the court, or the fireworks of the city, you will be immersed in it!

Single-player Immersion: The game is single-player and focuses on providing you with a deep story experience and strategic gameplay. No need to connect to the Internet, anytime and anywhere to enter this world full of intrigue and emotion!

The efforts of the development team:

The development team draws on the experience of previous games, listens to player suggestions, and strives to simplify complex gameplay, while retaining deep strategy and emotional interaction, to bring you the best game experience possible! Whether novice players or veteran players, you can easily get started and enjoy the fun of the game! At the same time, the development team will also carry out regular maintenance and updates according to the progress of the game and player feedback to ensure that everyone plays the game smoothly and happily.

Suitable for who to play?

Players who love visual novels and plot puzzles!

A player who loves city management and strategic construction!

Players interested in ancient Chinese background and Machiavelli struggle!

Players who want to experience emotional interaction with multiple endings!

The pursuit of beautiful painting style and immersive experience players!

Release Information:

Release platform: PC Steam

Release Information:

The main character line has been fully produced and players can play at will

Emperor line is currently open to the public in the first two chapters of the content, players can first experience the first two chapters of the story line content, read and experience the change of power

In the future, we will continue to update the unfinished chapters of the Emperor Line in a segmented update mode, the update frequency is once a month, and it is expected that all chapters will be updated in two months

supported_languages:
English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
